title: Janji Diana
overview: Diana is a troubled girl who blames her father for causing the death of her mother and for only listening to what her stepmother said. She has a problem trusting men until she met Haikal, a men who doesn't trust women after finding his fiancée, Sabrina cheating on him. Just when the two lovebirds are about to gain each other's trust, Sabrina returns and tries to prevent them from getting together.
